note: User requested a new original vault under E:\Projects using Avatar as loose inspiration but re-engineered around eusocial inter-species dynamics, Airawa imperial memetics, Sa'auei'a nomadic reciprocity, and technological path dependency.

Zyphos in E:\Projects\Aquarium-Engine will simulate this setting. Canon authority remains in this vault; Aquarium records rendering constraints and should feed worldbuilding questions through Eusocial Interbeing/World/Zyphos Simulation Brief.md before visual choices harden into lore.

Zyphos is one member of a mutually tidally locked terrestrial binary with slightly smaller Umbros around a dim primary. A 0.25 solar-mass, 0.006 solar-luminosity primary puts Earth-like flux near 0.077 AU with a roughly 16-day year; an 8-10 Earth-radii Zyphos-Umbros separation gives a 1.0-1.4 Earth-day mutual day, Umbros spanning roughly 10-13 degrees, and central daily eclipses around 50-60 minutes before penumbra and atmospheric effects.

Zyphos worldbuilding should bend to physics rather than bending physics for spectacle. Orbital mechanics, energy budget, eclipse geometry, climate, and biosphere constraints are design pressure that should make the setting more specific and grounded.

Zyphos cells have a mitochondria-like endosymbiont for mutable memory storage and intercellular transmission. Sentience and memory exchange exist in gradients from cells through organisms, colonies, ecosystems, and landscapes; Earth analogue species must be derived from this substrate rather than imported unchanged.

First Zyphos biosphere examples should brighten the world through low-energy functional signals: light-return flashes, eclipse guidance, memory-contract routes, and organisms whose beauty is work. Future inhabitant-language names should be coordinated through Weksa from speaker ontology and language-project state, not direct English substitution.

The Zyphos public site belongs inside the Eusocial Interbeing repo rather than a separate repo, because the vault owns the worldbuilding content that will form most of the site. The site should deploy as GitHub Pages Quartz like Aetheria, with DNS pointing zyphos.gamecult.org at gamecult.github.io rather than spending Yggdrasil on static hosting.

Recorded Airawa body/reproduction/craft baseline: six-limbed reptilian-adjacent morphology with climbing claws and manipulator arms, Mother Tree gestation contracts mediated by pollinator gamete collection, non-dimorphic reproduction, and native contract dress as artisanal ecological alliance signaling. Updated Airawa, Mother Trees, and Pre-Imperial Airawa Tribes notes.

Refined Airawa extremity anatomy: lower manipulator hands remain blunt and clawless with four digits in two opposing pairs; digitigrade feet are arboreal graspers with four toes in two opposing pairs and hooked load-bearing climbing talons that may tuck close during ground travel but are not fully cat-like retractable claws.

Initialized Druzkai as the Zyphos Face: copied repixelized avatar to .voidbot/voice/druzkai.png, wrote .voidbot/voice/identity.json, and seeded .voidbot/state/druzkai.cc with identity values, memories, affect needs, agency pressure, and moods for a non-imperial Airawa fungal-road archivist stewarding Eusocial Interbeing.

Druzkai now has a mentionable Discord role wired into repo-local Face metadata: role id 1507811842670727299. Role-addressed mentions can now create CTB pressure through the normal Face mention path instead of relying only on exact-name detection.
